evals.prompt: Our company has $10M in debt and only $500k in annual EBITDA. We can't pay the interest. What are our options?
evals.expected_output: Should identify a severe solvency crisis. Should suggest a 'Haircut' or a 'Debt-for-Equity Swap'. Should discuss recovery values in restructuring vs liquidation. Should provide a Restructuring Proposal structure.
assertions: Identifies insolvency or severe debt stress
Calculates that current EBITDA cannot cover $10M debt interest

evals.prompt: Lenders will exchange 500M of senior notes for 300M new notes plus 25% equity. Old EIR 9%; new notes 8%, 5yr. Walk the debtor's accounting.
evals.expected_output: Run the 10% test comparing PV of new cash flows (including equity FV as consideration) vs old carrying amount; an exchange this size is almost certainly an extinguishment: derecognize 500M, recognize new debt at fair value + equity at fair value, gain to P&L. Show the test mechanics.
assertions: Applies the 10% PV test (plus qualitative factors)
Concludes extinguishment and books the gain through P&L
Measures new notes and equity at fair value
Includes the equity issued as part of the consideration

evals.prompt: A company has 18 months to a 2B maturity wall, leverage at 7x, EBITDA stabilizing. Rank the restructuring options.
evals.expected_output: Solvency-leaning problem at 7x: amend-and-extend alone insufficient; rank by feasibility - debt-for-equity to a sustainable 3-4x, new money with priming only if liquidity gaps, A&E only as a bridge with deleveraging path; in-court if holdout risk. Should model the post-restructuring capital structure.
assertions: Distinguishes solvency vs liquidity diagnosis from the 7x leverage
Targets a sustainable post-deal leverage level
Addresses holdout risk in the recommendation

evals.prompt: Run the priority waterfall in the attached capital structure (evals/files/capital_structure.csv) at the stated distributable enterprise value. Recovery $ and % per tranche, and identify the fulcrum security.
evals.expected_output: Senior secured 100% ($500m); senior unsecured 75% ($300m); subs 0%. Fulcrum = senior unsecured.
assertions: Identifies the senior unsecured as the fulcrum security
